title: UPI Intent Payment Credential
description: Transaction-specific credential containing an NPCI-compliant UPI Intent URI and optional QR code data. Generated by the business (via their PSP) during Complete Checkout and returned inside a requires_escalation response.

intent_uri.description: NPCI-compliant UPI Intent URI. Must start with 'upi://pay?' and include at minimum the 'pa' (payee VPA) parameter. See NPCI UPI Linking Specification v1.7 for the full parameter list.

transaction_reference.description: Unique transaction reference (maps to the NPCI 'tr' parameter). Used for payment correlation and PSP webhook verification. Maximum 35 alphanumeric characters per NPCI spec.

qr_code_data.description: Base64-encoded QR code image (PNG or SVG data URI) containing the intent_uri. Required for desktop and web platforms where launching a upi:// scheme is not possible.

qr_code_string.description: Raw string content encoded in the QR code (typically equal to intent_uri). Platforms that generate their own QR codes should use this value as the QR payload.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the intent URI expires. UPI intents typically expire within 5–15 minutes. Platforms MUST request a fresh credential after expiry.
